objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) malware has exfiltrated collected data via Telegram bot C2 channels using encrypted communications.(Citation: Domain Tools Handala Hack Karma Homeland Justice MOIS April 2026)
